name: United States 12 Month Oil Fund, LP
summary: United States 12 Month Oil Fund, LP (USL) is a Delaware limited partnership and commodity pool that issues exchange-traded limited partnership interests on NYSE Arca. USL's investment objective is for daily changes in its per share NAV to reflect daily changes in the spot price of light, sweet crude oil, measured by the average of 12 consecutive months of NYMEX crude oil futures contracts, plus interest on collateral holdings, less expenses.

products.name: USL Limited Partnership Shares
products.description: Exchange-traded limited partnership interests tracking the average of 12 consecutive months of NYMEX light, sweet crude oil futures contracts, listed on NYSE Arca.

partnerships.description: Serves as the marketing agent for USL; fees paid by USCF.

partnerships.partner_name: The Bank of New York Mellon
partnerships.description: Serves as administrator, custodian, and provides accounting and transfer agent services for USL since April 1, 2020.
Exchange where USL shares are listed and traded since December 6, 2007.
